scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dong-/agentx-core && npm run build --workspace agyx
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @dong-/agentx-contracts && npm run test --workspace @dong-/cdxx && npm run test --workspace agyx
scripts.check:native-package: npm run check:native-package --workspace @dong-/cdxx && npm run check:native-package --workspace agyx
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run check && npm test && npm run check:native-package
